title: Fix accessing non-rand struct member in constraints

features.name: struct member access in constraint block
features.description: Code should include a constraint block that accesses a struct member where the struct is used in randomize() with external constraints
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [7:0] x; }; randomized obj; constraint c { obj.x > 0; }

features.name: non-rand struct member accessed in constraints
features.description: Code should include a struct with a non-random member that is accessed inside a constraint block during randomization
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [31:0] a; string s; } t; constraint c { t.s == "foo"; }
